internal_issues.description: SECTIONS.JSON INJECTION BUG: generate-html.js line 1777 checks SECTIONS_AVAILABLE before calling loadSectionsCache(), but SECTIONS_AVAILABLE is only set by loadSectionsCache() itself. getSection() is defined but never called. Result: sections.json content (EXP-001 through EXP-018 prose improvements) is NEVER injected into the published HTML. All analyst prose work silently ignored.

recommended_actions.action: HUMAN REQUIRED — ISS-454: Fix SECTIONS_AVAILABLE circular dependency in generate-html.js line 1777. Change 'if (SECTIONS_AVAILABLE) { const sections = loadSectionsCache();' to 'const sections = loadSectionsCache(); if (sections) {'. This unblocks ALL analyst prose improvements (EXP-001 through EXP-018) from appearing in published HTML.
